meaning: adj.瀵硅韩浣撴湁瀹崇殑,涓嶅崼鐢熺殑
examples: Tax the marketing and sale of unhealthful foods.
Oxygen plays a key role in metabolism, but can also be an unhealthful agent.
The unhealthful radioactivity in environment has increasingly been an interest problem.
Unless the industry makes changes--or appears to--regulators look willing to slap additional taxes on foods they deem to be unhealthful, and to sharply limit advertising and marketing.
